## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A — explain below).
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset` for releasable changes, `pnpm changeset --empty` for tooling-only). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#when-to-add-a-changeset).
- [ ] Docs updated if the public API changed (README, `docs/`, JSDoc on exported symbols).
- [ ] Attribution header added on any newly-ported file (Apache-2.0 source from `@solana/wallet-adapter` or `@wallet-standard`), and the file is listed in [`THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md`](../THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md).
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm build`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm size` all pass locally.
